amulet_corridor: ^A corridor to the mechanism gate. The has amulet is destroyed.
mirror_barrier: ^A mechanism-locked gate. Requires the activation item.
infinite_staircase: ^A chamber with no exit. You are trapped.
memory_prison: ^Another sealed chamber. There is no way out.
dream_library: ^A hidden area of the complex. No one has been here in decades.
spectral_garden: ^Another sealed section. Inaccessible from the main complex.
exit_node: ^You escape the crystal labyrinth. Your journey is complete.
